name: lf_trusted_section
template:
01 // RELIABILITY

Trusted by Global Innovators

Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad

The Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIMA) utilizes Krayin CRM for their Executive Education programs to streamline administration and enhance participant engagement.

Built on Krayin CRM →
CAMRA

Campaign for Real Ale (CAMRA) is an independent voluntary consumer organisation headquartered in St Albans, England.

Built on Krayin CRM →
Hult Prize

Hult Prize is a global social entrepreneurship founded in 2010. The organization inspires young people to solve the world's most pressing issues through social business.

Built on Krayin CRM →
UNILAVRAS

UNILAVRAS is a leading educational center in Brazil, committed to academic excellence and social responsibility through innovative teaching.

Built on Krayin CRM →
DESATNICK

Desatnick Real Estate is a prestigious agency specializing in luxury coastal properties, delivering exceptional service and results.

Built on Krayin CRM →

name: lf_tabs_section
template:
02 // ARCHITECTURE

The Functional Core of Krayin

Sales Management

Features that assist with lead tracking, deal management, and sales forecasting.

Marketing Automation

Tools for campaign management, email marketing, and customer segmentation.

Customer Support

Systems for VoIP, live chat, and customer feedback across multiple channels.

Data and Analytics

Functions for reporting, performance analysis, and deep actionable insights.

Opportunity into Revenue

Provides with all the tools to manage and capture important leads and opportunities at scale.

Custom Fields

Add unlimited custom fields to adapt the CRM to your unique business requirements and company logic.

Activities Management

Keep track of sales activities like meetings, calls, and notes to ensure nothing falls through the cracks.

Access Control List

Assign specific roles to users to ensure they have the right access to records, keeping data secure.

Contact Management

Everything you need to know about the people and organizations you do business with, in one place.

Product Creation

Manage all products and services your company offers, tracking inventory and adding value to every lead.

name: lf_square section
template:
03 // INTELLIGENCE

Agentic AI for Intelligent CRM Automation

AI Powered CRM Development

Build intelligent CRM systems with AI-driven workflows, predictive insights, and automation.

AI Chatbot Development for CRM

Deploy AI chatbots that handle customer queries, capture leads, and deliver instant responses.

AI Customer Support Automation

Automate support operations using AI to classify tickets, recommend solutions, and resolve issues faster.

AI Sales Intelligence for CRM

Use AI insights to identify opportunities, predict customer intent, and prioritize deals effectively.

AI Marketing Automation for CRM

Enable AI-driven campaign automation, smart audience segmentation, and personalized engagement.

Agentic AI and Automation

Deploy autonomous AI agents that analyze data, make decisions, and execute CRM workflows.
